summary: Mervinger, a powerful wizard, is trapped in a prison and forced to participate in the Dragon's Test. However, it turns out that this was actually a trap set by Mephistopheles, the Dark Prince. Mervinger soon realizes his true predicament and decides to use his abilities to escape. He uses his magic to possess a new body and attempts to break free from his prison. Along the way, he recalls his family's tragic past and the struggles they faced during a war against demons.
key_moments: Mervinger is trapped in a prison
The Dragon's Test turns out to be a trap set by Mephistopheles
Mervinger uses his magic to possess a new body
